data.body: EPIC COMPLETE: dc09 (pristine-horrible-whapuku) CLOSED. Enforcement LIVE on main (require_authenticated=true + enforce_since=8dcef776). All 5 children closed (79da/4dc0/1a51/8d91/8d39) + discovered bug 0ba4 (centralized finalize_event signing seam) closed. Flip landed as Gerrit 759 -> origin/main 8bb261c19 (LLM-Review+1, Verified+1). Grandfathering test 817aaa84c landed. Follow-up d716 (config-test isolation) left open, non-blocking. Epic closed unsigned via the certifiable:false soft path (children force-closed as operational) — correct behavior. The authenticated-identity rollout is DONE.
